name: AutoTLM
description: The library for the AutoTLM One car-telemetry dev dongle: OBD-II PIDs/DTCs/VIN over from-scratch ISO 15765-4 (TWAI), GNSS, IMU, captive-portal provisioning and a road-proven dual-core HTTP telemetry push.
keywords: obd, obd-ii, can, iso15765, telemetry, car, automotive, gnss, gps, imu, esp32
